mapper.select: SELECT customer_name || '-' || phone AS customer_key, customer_name AS name, phone, COUNT(*) AS total_reservations, SUM( CASE WHEN reservation_datetime < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AND status NOT IN ('NOSHOW', 'CANCELLED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS valid_visits, SUM( CASE WHEN status = 'NOSHOW' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS no_show_count, TO_CHAR(MAX(reservation_datetime), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS last_reservation_date, ( SELECT treatment_name FROM ( SELECT t2.treatment_name AS treatment_name, COUNT(*) AS treatment_count, MAX(r2.reservation_datetime) AS latest_datetime FROM reservation r2 JOIN treatment t2 ON r2.treatment_id = t2.treatment_id WHERE r2.customer_name = r.customer_name AND r2.phone = r.phone GROUP BY t2.treatment_name ORDER BY treatment_count DESC, latest_datetime DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) AS favorite_treatment FROM reservation r GROUP BY customer_name, phone ORDER BY CASE WHEN SUM( CASE WHEN reservation_datetime < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AND status NOT IN ('NOSHOW', 'CANCELLED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) >= 2 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, MAX(reservation_datetime) DESC

SELECT r.reservation_id, t.treatment_name AS treatment_name, r.status, TO_CHAR(r.reservation_datetime, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS date_time, r.delay_message FROM reservation r JOIN treatment t ON r.treatment_id = t.treatment_id WHERE r.customer_name = #{name} AND r.phone = #{phone} ORDER BY r.reservation_datetime DESC

SELECT r.customer_name AS customerName, r.phone AS phone, COUNT(*) AS totalReservations,
SUM( CASE WHEN r.reservation_datetime < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AND r.status NOT IN ('NOSHOW', 'CANCELLED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS validVisits,
SUM( CASE WHEN r.status = 'NOSHOW' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) AS noShowCount,
ROUND( CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 0 ELSE ( SUM(CASE WHEN r.status = 'NOSHOW' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) ) END , 1) AS noShowRate,
CASE WHEN SUM( CASE WHEN r.reservation_datetime < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AND r.status NOT IN ('NOSHOW', 'CANCELLED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) >= 2 THEN '재방문' ELSE '첫 방문' END AS revisitType,
TO_CHAR(MAX(r.reservation_datetime), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS lastReservationDate,
( SELECT treatmentName FROM ( SELECT t2.treatment_name AS treatmentName, COUNT(*) AS treatmentCount, MAX(r2.reservation_datetime) AS latestDatetime FROM reservation r2 JOIN treatment t2 ON r2.treatment_id = t2.treatment_id WHERE r2.customer_name = r.customer_name AND r2.phone = r.phone GROUP BY t2.treatment_name ORDER BY treatmentCount DESC, latestDatetime DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) AS favoriteTreatment
FROM reservation r GROUP BY r.customer_name, r.phone ORDER BY CASE WHEN SUM( CASE WHEN r.reservation_datetime < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP AND r.status NOT IN ('NOSHOW', 'CANCELLED') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ) >= 2 THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, MAX(r.reservation_datetime) DESC
